title: Civil Aviation Daily Occurrence Report System - Open Government Portal
content:
## Civil Aviation Daily Occurrence Report System
The system provides initial information on occurrences involving any Canadian-registered aircraft as well as events which occur at Canadian airports, in Canadian sovereign airspace, or international airspace for which Canada has accepted responsibility that includes events involving foreign registered aircraft.
- Publisher - Current Organization Name: Transport Canada
- Licence: Open Government Licence - Canada
